subject: VVP - Update traceability matrix
commit_message:
VVP - Update traceability matrix

Adding logic for pulling only Heat reqs that are MUST/MUST NOT, adding validation_mode and links to requirements and tests in traceability matrix.

Issue-ID: VVP-148

Change-Id: Ib895fd8a6dc28265020a83c459ada387f660765f
Signed-off-by: Bozawglanian, Hagop (hb755d) <hb755d@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Let's meet tomorrow to discuss.  I didn't realize this was something you were working on, and thought I took the action item to update the traceability matrix.  I've coded up something and it's a little different.

I also don't think we're going to have VVP dynamically pull in teh requirements any longer due to the desire to lock down exactly what we're validating as part of the certification program.
